trustCues.title: Real support
trustCues.description: Every order is checked on WhatsApp before payment or dispatch.

trustCues.title: Clear catalog
trustCues.description: Products are arranged by category with prices, details and images.

trustCues.title: Mobile friendly
trustCues.description: Navigation, filters, cart and hero imagery are designed for phone screens.

trustCues.title: Careful claims
trustCues.description: Copy focuses on routine, scent and freshness rather than unverified medical promises.

orderSteps.title: Choose
orderSteps.description: Browse the five EcoSuds categories or use the filter on the store page.

orderSteps.title: Add
orderSteps.description: Add products to the local cart without creating an account.

orderSteps.title: Send
orderSteps.description: Open the prepared WhatsApp message with product names, quantities and total.

orderSteps.title: Confirm
orderSteps.description: Availability, delivery charges and payment method are confirmed manually.

careNotes.title: For soap lovers
careNotes.description: Keep bars dry between uses and store them on a draining dish for a longer-lasting routine.

careNotes.title: For bath rituals
careNotes.description: Use bath salts and bath bombs for a relaxing soak according to your own skin comfort.

careNotes.title: For shower routines
careNotes.description: Place shower steamers where they receive splashes, not a direct heavy stream, for a slower release.
